pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLPs, wider 3.5× layers, all-int6 GPTQ, and a GPU-side causal n-gram tilt that acts as sparse auxiliary memory.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA + CUTLASS EVT MLP kernels
All-int6 GPTQ with LR floor and MLP 3.5× capacity
GPU-side causal n-gram tilt as sparse auxiliary memory
